description: Control panel no longer renders a Template Library tab.
No remaining workflow-control or workflow-editor link routes the user into the removed template-library screen.
Legacy TemplateLibrary component tree is removed from build inputs without breaking workflow-control render.
Legacy WorkflowEditorComponent/TestWorkflowModal/WorkflowVersionsDialog are removed or unreachable without compile errors.
packages/workflows action barrel no longer exports workflow-editor-actions.
packages/workflows action barrel no longer exports workflow-runtime-actions.
packages/workflows action barrel no longer exports template-library-actions.
Deleting legacy action modules does not leave unresolved imports in workflow package components.
No component or action in active workflow-v2 UI imports workflow-editor-actions after the cut.
No component or action in active workflow-v2 UI imports template-library-actions after the cut.
No active server code calls getWorkflowRuntime() after the cut.
Server/shared init no longer imports shared/workflow/init legacy bootstrap modules.
The app boots without constructing the legacy TypeScriptWorkflowRuntime singleton.
Legacy shared persistence models for workflow_executions/events/event_processing/snapshots are removed from compile inputs.
Integration email domain actions no longer depend on workflow v1 runtime or workflow_executions.
Invoice or related legacy workflow helper actions no longer query workflow_executions.
Workflow visualization actions no longer depend on workflow_registrations or system_workflow_registrations.
Workflow event attachment actions/models no longer depend on legacy registration/version tables.
Workflow editor still loads the v2 list/designer surface after template-library removal.
Workflow control still loads the v2 operational tabs after template-library removal.
Legacy v1 unit tests are removed or updated so the workflow package test suite no longer expects getWorkflowRuntime().
Migration drops workflow_template_categories if present.
Migration drops workflow_templates if present.
Migration drops workflow_registrations if present.
Migration drops workflow_registration_versions if present.
Migration drops system_workflow_registrations if present.
Migration drops system_workflow_registration_versions if present.
Migration drops workflow_executions if present.
Migration drops workflow_events if present.
Migration drops workflow_event_processing if present.
Migration drops workflow_snapshots if present.
Migration succeeds in an environment where some legacy workflow tables are already absent.
Legacy workflow template seed files are removed or no longer run during seeding.
Legacy system-workflow seed data for the retired runtime is removed or no longer referenced.
Tenant export no longer references dropped workflow_executions/workflow_events tables.
Tenant deletion logic no longer references dropped workflow_snapshots or other v1 tables.
Citus/distribution migration helpers no longer fail when v1 workflow tables are removed.
The local app boots to /msp/workflow-editor after the v1 hard cut.
The local app boots to /msp/workflow-control after the v1 hard cut.
Stale docs/comments/menu labels do not describe template library or workflow v1 editor as active product behavior.
